String: The need to stay in a healthy mental state during combat has caused PreMet Collision armor to become a popular choice against the striking blows caused by rubber bullet and high pain weaponry. The user will find themselves much tougher to break in terms of mental stability.

Incorporating a layer of non-newtonian fluid, Dilatant armor has a “bend or break” counteractive effect on incoming projectiles. This system is very light compared to the ablative plating of most armors.

Modern threats require modern solutions, and this cutting-edge energy dispersal armor is that solution. Marketed to corporate commandos going up against their technophilic competitors, it has a glossy, futuristic aesthetic.

Upon the discovery of the xenomorph colony on Necars Field, and the subsequent discovery of the incredible resilience of the alien carapace, research began immediately to study potential military applications of the procured xenomorph components. The result is this unique set of armor, whose organic appearance reflects the origin of its component parts.

Part of the set of prototype armor stolen from the Galactic Intelligence Service by the organization colloquially known as the Men in Black, and subsequently released for purchase in limited quantities in order to sustain the MIB's continued rebellion.
To top off your Halloween costume, this helmet will truly make you look as threatening as a Black Shuck.
To top off your Halloween costume, this helmet will truly make you look as threatening as an Echion.

After Locans Systems was edged out of the armor market, larger corporations took over their designs. The remade Locans Stabilized armors retain their resistance against higher mass ballistics, while using materials that allow them to be viable in regular combat.

The Pythica Durable Battle series of armor is the revolutionized self of its earlier Ceremonial versions. It provides unrivalled protection, with even higher density made possible by further research into crystal lattice technology.
A blend of CryoTech Industries’ four main lines of combat armor, this armor employs miniature nano-injectors of all varieties to treat physical fatigue in each of its forms.
This sleek pair of acetate frames are both light-weight and comfortable.
